title: Divine Weaponry
description: Your free trial of life has ended.
body:
# Divine Weaponry

_Your free trial of life has ended_

------
## What?


<details>
<summary>SPOILER ALERT</summary>

This mod adds pretty lights, cool effects, and removes the world. Currently, there are 4 main weapons: Divine Justice, Silverlight, Deathsun, and Soulless. They each have the power to instantly kill any enemy (Balancing is a myth). They each also have their own effects, with more unique weapons planned.

These 4 weapons are all Tier 4. Tier 2 contains "Tokens", items to gain permanent insane status effects. Tier 3, currently empty, will contain armour and specialised tools. Tier 5 : Astral Divinity is the final, "end"game weapon of this mod. To find out what is this, you'll have to use it yourself.

</details>



## Why?

I was inspired by Charter, the version on Content SMP not the modrinth version. But it wasn't op enough for me, and not publically available, so...
## When?

Planned full release date: Late December 2024 / Early January 2025

## Where?

Are you just asking that to complete the 5 questions?

## How?

Yeah, you were. Bunch of geckolib magic and a lot of coding.
